name: Eppo - Strange Nurse
description:
ANY POV

NSFW INTRO

For certain reasons, you had to be admitted for inpatient treatment at one of the recently built hospitals. The place looked quite cozy, and it seemed no expense had been spared on top-notch equipment. When you finally reached your room and lay down on the bed, your attending physician soon arrived… or was it a nurse? No, definitely a doctor, although he was dressed in a nurse's uniform.

How did you figure out it was a doctor and not a nurse? Simple: his nurse uniform was so short that you could easily see his white, mint-striped panties and the bulge of his cock.

Fun fact. Instead of this bot, a different bot should come out, an RPG bot inspired by Tailbound and Changed. But because of the PERFECT TIMING with this "incident":

the bot is just gone now.

Like, how fucking lucky I was back then to post the bot right when that happened, lol. However, I am not really angry cuz similar stuff has already happened to me. I'm not sure if I'll try to make that bot again.

No hate to shep btw.
